hero.title: Track hot coins and convert crypto in seconds.
hero.description: KriptoUstası gives you a simple place to follow trending coins and quickly convert any crypto amount into USD, EUR, AZN, GBP, or TRY.

about.title: About KriptoUstası
about.description: KriptoUstası is a practical crypto tracker and converter. It helps you see what is moving in the market and convert values without jumping between tools.

seo.homeDescription: Track trending crypto coins in real time and instantly convert crypto amounts to USD, EUR, AZN, GBP, and TRY.
seo.aboutTitle: About KriptoUstası - Mission, Data, and Methodology
seo.aboutDescription: Learn how KriptoUstası sources market data, updates prices, and keeps the crypto dashboard fast and easy to use.

dashboard.converterDescription: Pick a coin, enter an amount, and instantly see its value in fiat currencies.
dashboard.trendingDescription: A live-style snapshot of coins leading by market cap.
dashboard.searchPlaceholder: Search by coin name or symbol...

aboutPage.missionText: KriptoUstası is built to make daily crypto tracking feel easy, fast, and clear. We focus on useful information, so you can check trending assets and convert values without friction.
highlights: See top market-cap coins in one clean table with frequent updates.
Convert crypto amounts to USD, EUR, AZN, GBP, and TRY right away.
Find coins quickly by typing the name or symbol.
Switch language or theme without losing your place.
aboutPage.dataText: Price data comes from CryptoCompare endpoints. The dashboard refreshes on a schedule to stay current while keeping the interface smooth.
methodologyPoints: Memoized values help avoid repeated work.
Deferred search keeps typing responsive even with longer lists.
Polling updates only what is needed, not the whole page.
aboutPage.disclaimerText: KriptoUstası is for information only and is not financial advice. Always confirm price, fees, and liquidity on your exchange before trading.
